scenarios.name: Default — no rating
scenarios.description: Loads with value=null. Expects 5 outline stars, no console errors, role=radiogroup present.

scenarios.name: Pre-rated 3 of 5
scenarios.description: Loads with value=3. Expects 3 filled + 2 outlined.

scenarios.name: Value out-of-range (clamped)
scenarios.description: value=10, maxStars=5. Expects render-only clamp to 5 filled, no write-back.

scenarios.name: Invalid maxStars
scenarios.description: maxStars=0 renders the inline error placeholder.

scenarios.name: Disabled state
scenarios.description: isControlDisabled=true. Expects dimmed stars, no pointer/keyboard interaction.
